name: Frosting Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Box Duncan Hines Yellow cake mix
1 can Pillsbury Creamy Deluxe Coconut Pecan Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake mix, eggs, oil, and water well in a large bowl until combined.
2. Stir in the chopped pecans until evenly distributed.
3. Spray a bundt cake pan with cooking spray and dust with flour to prevent sticking.
4. Place the pan on the top rack of the oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius).
5. Bake for 45 to 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Remove the cake from the pan while it is still hot and let it cool completely before frosting.
